localized_texts.text: Adventure Waterpark Desaru Coast

Head on over to Desaru Resort Waterpark with your family and friends, and prepare yourself for a splashingly good time! Explore the waterpark's five zones, each featuring different levels of rides. Explore a setting filled with intrigue, pirates, and young heroes at Penawar Falls. With the classic Swinging Ship and with multiple waterfalls tumbling over rising cliffs into a pond below, this zone is sure to capture the attention of both young and old alike. Ride along the long, looping, lazy Penawar River that floats amid the lush greenery of fishing village scenes and experience four giant water slides — the Wild Whirl, Super Twister, Riptide, and Temptest!
The park is set against the backdrop of a traditional Malaysian fishing village.
It is home to one of the world’s largest wave pools.
It features the first-ever water coaster in the region.
The park offers more than 20 wet and dry rides, slides, and attractions.

Explore five exciting zones at Desaru Coast Adventure Waterpark. Enjoy family-friendly rides like the Swinging Ship and Surf Wall at Penawar Falls, float along the 350m Penawar River with giant slides, and feel the thrill at Shipwreck Reef with Kraken’s Revenge. Splash around at the massive Tidal Wave Beach wave pool or relax at beachside cabanas. For younger guests, Kids Ahoy offers safe, fun-filled play areas with multiple slides and water features designed for toddlers to early teens.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Adventure Waterpark Desaru Coast official website for any updates of operation hours.
Restrictions: Admission to rides, slides and attractions are restricted by height and weight requirements. Please check height guideline located at the rides.
Dresscode: Guests are required to dress in appropriate swimming attire for the water slides, pools and wave pool.
Dresscode: Cotton t-shirts and tracksuits are NOT allowed in all water slides, pools and wave pool.
Dresscode: Babies and toddlers are required to wear swim diapers or swim pants.
Accessibility: Wheelchairs are available in the Waterpark. Please reach out to the personnel at the Guest Service Counter for further assistance.
What’s included: The Super Twister
What’s included: The Surf Wall
What’s included: Swinging Ship
What’s included: Wild Whirl
What’s included: The Tempest
What’s included: Riptide
What’s included: Penawar River
What’s included: Kraken’s Revenge
What’s included: Tidal Wave Beach
What’s included: 1 Days Entry Ticket in Adventure Waterpark
What’s included: Kids Ahoy
What’s included: Penawar Falls
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please present either mobile or printed voucher along with your IC / passport for entry.

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid on the selected visit date. Re-entry is not allowed after leaving the venue.Eligibility Free Admission: Children below 3 years old. Child: 3 – 11 years old OR up to 121 cm in height. Adult: 12 – 59 years old OR above 121 cm in height. Senior: 60 years old and above. Guests below 18 years old must be accompanied by fully vaccinated parents.Attraction Access Rides or attractions may be closed temporarily due to bad weather, repairs, or maintenance. Visitors must comply with the required dress code when using waterpark facilities and rides. Guests must wear modest swimwear, shirts, or T-shirts at all times. Swimwear must not contain zippers, buttons, or hard objects. Swim diapers are required for infants.Additional Information Additional Items (Pay on the spot) : Locker Fees ( Small Locker - RM20 ; Big Locker - RM40)/ Meal Voucher (RM 10) Outside food and drinks are not allowed inside the venue. Pets are not allowed, except for service animals with valid identification. The venue is not responsible for lost, misplaced, or stolen belongings.Important Notes Main traveller’s name must match the IC / passport. Incorrect names may result in invalid redemption. Smoking and drinking are strictly prohibited. Guests found violating the rules may be asked to leave immediately.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
